_comment: Canonical request payload shapes for internal API communication between g8ee and g8ed. These models ensure wire compatibility for internal management and event delivery operations.

sse_push._description: Payload for POST /api/internal/sse/push. g8ee pushes an SSE event to g8ed for delivery. Targeted delivery uses web_session_id; BackgroundEvent fan-out uses user_id only.

user_id.description: User ID used for fan-out when web_session_id is absent, and for authorization in all cases

web_session_id.description: Target web session ID for targeted delivery. When null, the event is fanned out to all connected sessions for user_id (BackgroundEvent semantics).

event.description: The SSE event payload to be delivered

intent_request._description: Payload for granting or revoking intents for an operator.

unlock_account._description: Payload for unlocking a user account.

user_id.description: ID of the user to unlock
